heading: Nonadministrative expenses; expenses of studies and investigations
label: 1438a Nonadministrative expenses; expenses of studies and investigations
text: On and after , expenses of the Board in making studies or investigations specifically directed by law, or requested by the Congress or either House thereof or by a committee of either House, including services authorized by , shall be considered as nonadministrative expenses.July 12, 1960section 3109 of title 5
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “ ()” on authority of , , , section 1 of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.Section 3109 of title 5section 15 of the Act of August 2, 19465 U.S.C. 55asection 7(b) of Pub. L. 89–55480 Stat. 631Sept. 6, 1966
